Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user has provided a detailed schema and sample data for an order processing system and wants me to identify anomalies and propose SQL queries for investigation Let me analyze the data carefully

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normal Process Flow 1 Register Order Sales 2 Perform Credit Check Finance 3 Validate Stock Warehouse 4 Confirm Shipment Logistics 5 Ship Goods Logistics 6 Issue Invoice Finance 7 Receive Payment Finance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 Follows the normal flow perfectly steps 1 7 in order No anomalies

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Activities in order 1 Register Order event 8 0820 2 Confirm Shipment event 9 0825 SKIPPED Credit Check and Validate Stock shipped BEFORE credit check 3 Ship Goods event 10 0840 Shipped before credit check 4 Perform Credit Check event 11 0910 Credit check AFTER shipment 5 Validate Stock event 12 0915 Stock validation AFTER shipment 6 Issue Invoice event 13 0930 7 Receive Payment event 14 1000 next day

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Credit Check and Validate Stock happen AFTER Ship Goods out of order skipped in proper sequence attempted early Y on Confirm Shipment suggests someone tried to rush the process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Activities in order 1 Register Order event 15 0845 2 Perform Credit Check event 16 0900 3 Ship Goods event 17 0910 SKIPPED Validate Stock and Confirm Shipment 4 Issue Invoice event 18 0930 5 Confirm Shipment event 19 0945 late confirmation Y confirmed AFTER goods shipped 6 Receive Payment event 20 1100

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Validate Stock was skipped entirely Confirm Shipment happens after Ship Goods reverse order late confirmation Y confirms the anomaly Confirm Shipment and Validate Stock are both missing from the proper sequence

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Activities in order 1 Register Order event 21 0900 2 Receive Payment event 22 0905 Payment received immediately after registration before any processing 3 Issue Invoice event 23 0920 Invoice AFTER payment 4 Confirm Shipment event 24 0925 shipment scheduled N 5 Ship Goods event 25 0950

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Receive Payment happens right after Register Order within 5 minutes before any credit check stock validation or shipment Credit Check and Validate Stock are entirely missing Issue Invoice comes AFTER Receive Payment shipment scheduled N on Confirm Shipment

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: No payment received event wait it has Receive Payment but no prior credit check

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me now formulate SQL queries to investigate these

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me think about comprehensive SQL queries 1 Detect cases where activities are out of the expected order eg Ship Goods before Credit Check or Validate Stock 2 Detect cases missing key activities Credit Check Validate Stock 3 Detect cases where Receive Payment happens unusually early before Ship Goods 4 Find resources that are involved in anomalous cases 5 Check order values for anomalous cases are higher value orders more prone to bypassing controls 6 Find activities that happen out of sequence 7 Detect unusual timing patterns
